title: [release-1.3] Bump to Skopeo v1.3.1, c/common v0.38.11, c/storage v1.31.3
body: Bumping to Skopeo v1.3.1, c/common to v0.38.11, and c/storage to v1.31.3 in preparation for RHEL 8.4.0.2

comments.body: The validate seems to be failing on the second commit.  We need to get this in today, I think I'll do a new PR with just the first commit and then do a follow up PR to bump the version to dev.
